name: World Bank Private Participation in Infrastructure (PPI) Database
description: 16,051 projects total, 201 airport concessions in 30+ emerging market countries. Rich descriptive fields (mean 1,564 chars/project) with sponsors, concession terms, financial structure.
notes: 95MB Stata .dta file. Use pyreadstat to load. Filter sector='Airport' for 201 concession records. Rich narrative descriptions ideal for LLM concession terms extraction pipeline (first concrete LLM pipeline per Appendix C Week 3).
